steps.title: Locate the explicit question
steps.content: After saying that "y'all" has spread beyond the South and Black communities, the passage asks, "What explains its rise in popularity?" The rest of the passage answers by saying "y'all" is more precise because it always refers to two or more people.

steps.title: Reject unanswered questions
steps.content: Choice A asks for a count of other plural pronouns, which the passage never provides. Choice C asks for the first recorded use. Choice D asks about regions outside the US. The remaining choice restates the question the text directly answers. The answer is B.
